evals.prompt:
分析这段 Kafka Producer 日志：

[2026-01-15 10:23:45] INFO  [kafka-producer-network-thread | producer-1] Successfully sent record to topic orders partition 5 offset 12345
[2026-01-15 10:23:46] ERROR [kafka-producer-network-thread | producer-1] Failed to send record to topic payments: TimeoutException
[2026-01-15 10:23:47] WARN  [kafka-producer-network-thread | producer-1] BufferExhaustedException: Buffer is full
expectations: 识别出 send_success 事件
识别出 send_failure 事件和 TimeoutException 错误
识别出 buffer_exhausted 事件
提供 TimeoutException 的修复建议

evals.prompt:
分析这段 Kafka Consumer 日志，重点关注消费积压问题：

[2026-01-15 10:23:48] INFO  [kafka-consumer-thread] Consumer group order-processor: assigned partitions [orders-0, orders-1]
[2026-01-15 10:23:49] WARN  [kafka-consumer-thread] Consumer group order-processor: lag exceeded threshold (50000 messages)
[2026-01-15 10:23:50] ERROR [kafka-consumer-thread] CommitFailedException: Commit cannot be completed due to group rebalance
evals.expected_output: 应该检测到消费积压和提交失败
expectations: 识别出 consumer_lag 事件，积压 50000 条
识别出 commit_failure 事件
提供增加 Consumer 实例的建议
提供调整 max.poll.interval.ms 的建议

evals.prompt:
分析这段 JSON 格式的 Kafka 日志：

{"timestamp": "2026-01-15T10:23:45Z", "level": "ERROR", "thread": "kafka-producer-1", "message": "Failed to send record to topic orders", "error": "NetworkException", "topic": "orders", "traceId": "abc-123"}
evals.expected_output: 应该正确解析 JSON 格式并提取字段
expectations: 正确解析 JSON 格式
提取 timestamp、level、thread 字段
识别 send_failure 事件和 NetworkException 错误
提取 traceId 字段

evals.prompt:
这段日志显示频繁 Rebalance，请分析原因并提供建议：

[2026-01-15 10:23:51] INFO  [kafka-consumer-thread] Revoking previously assigned partitions [orders-0]
[2026-01-15 10:23:52] INFO  [kafka-consumer-thread] (Re-)joining group order-processor
[2026-01-15 10:23:53] INFO  [kafka-consumer-thread] Successfully joined group order-processor with generation 5
[2026-01-15 10:23:54] INFO  [kafka-consumer-thread] Revoking previously assigned partitions [orders-0]
[2026-01-15 10:23:55] INFO  [kafka-consumer-thread] (Re-)joining group order-processor
evals.expected_output: 应该检测到频繁 Rebalance 问题
expectations: 识别出多次 rebalance 事件
指出 Rebalance 频繁的问题
提供 session.timeout.ms 和 max.poll.interval.ms 配置建议
建议使用静态成员 group.instance.id

evals.prompt:
分析这段 Broker 日志：

[2026-01-15 10:23:56] INFO  [ReplicaManager] Partition orders-5: leader changed from 1 to 2
[2026-01-15 10:23:57] WARN  [ReplicaFetcherThread] Replica not available for partition orders-5
[2026-01-15 10:23:58] ERROR [KafkaApi] NotLeaderForPartitionException: Leader not local for partition orders-5
evals.expected_output: 应该识别 Broker 层面的问题
expectations: 识别出 leader_change 事件
识别出 replica_unavailable 事件
识别出 not_leader 事件
说明这是正常的 Leader 切换，可以重试
